subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter dated the 25th of Safar 1329 was received, and from its contents it became evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه۲۵ صفر ۱۳۲۹ رسید از مضمون چنان معلوم گردید که جواب
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @eulogies; reminiscences
